Package cz.cvut.fel.omo.handlers

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractHandler
    This class is an abstract class for handling events.
    BrokenDeviceHandler
    This class represents handler for broken device.
    DeviceHandler
    This class represents handler for device.
    EquipmentHandler
    This class represents handler for equipment.
    NoActivityHandler
    This class represents handler for no activity.
    PersonHandler
    This class represents handler for person.
    SensorHandler
    This class represents handler for sensor.
    WeatherHandler
    This class represents handler for weather.
    WindowHandler
    This class represents handler for window.
